match.userMessage:
Gentle handheld hold with subtle micro-movement maintains eye-level framing on Scarlett paused at the sand's edge. Her right hand draws the coral lipstick tube from her pocket and slowly rolls it once between her fingers in quiet consideration, body remaining still with gaze directed off toward the water.

A light sea breeze lifts loose strands of hair while faint particles of sand drift across the foreground.

gentle ocean waves and soft sea breeze. soft fabric rustle from pocket, lipstick tube rolling between fingers.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
